trail.val: Q1 FY26 OP guide ~JPY1.3tn vs buyside JPY1.1-1.2tn; OP run-rate higher than Toyota

forward.note: Guide is the cleanest near-term read on the NAND ASP up-cycle.

trail.val: Datacenter + enterprise targeted >60% of revenue by FY2028; NAND market CAGR 20%+ (up to 46%) 2025->2028
Deliberately cautious capex ~JPY280bn/yr, sized to ~20% bit-growth CAGR
Watch-item: if bit-growth outlook raised 20%->30% CAGR, capex up ~JPY400bn->JPY600bn/yr — 'could worry the market'
Capex averaging ~JPY470bn/yr FY26-28; R&D rising to JPY230bn/yr

forward.note: Actual capex threaded the needle below the feared ~JPY600bn.

trail.val: BiCS Gen.10 (332 layers) sampling summer 2026, mass production within a year

forward.note: Cost/power competitiveness vs Samsung/SK Hynix V-NAND is the watch-item.

trail.val: Super IO (SLC, ultra-low-latency) shipping 10M units this year vs 3M last, targeting 100M next year; NVIDIA partner; SanDisk HPF not until 2028

forward.note: Agentic-AI IO/latency angle; Conor's top reason to prefer Kioxia over SanDisk.

trail.val: Kioxia NAND-market sizing ~1,100 EB now -> ~2,000 EB by 2030
eSSD sizing moved up: Samsung/Hynix now peg ~500 EB (vs SanDisk mid-400s), ~50-60% CAGR

forward.note: TAM trajectory underpinning multi-year LTA negotiations into 2027.
